--- title: "Alpha Diversity" author: - name: Muluh params: index: default --- ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ## Group-wise comparisons - **Index:** shannon - **Group variable:** diet - **Multiple testing correction:** FDR - **Statistical test** Wilcoxon In the report, a suffix of 1~ Baseline and 2~ Week 6 ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell layout-align="center"} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](alpha_shannon_files/figure-html/fig-figure-of-findings-before-after-1.png){#fig-figure-of-findings-before-after fig-align='center' width=480} ::: ::: ### Table of the top findings #### Across-group ##### Before treatment - Multiple testing correction: **FDR** - Statistical test: **Wilcoxon** ::: {#tbl-table-of-findings-before .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ##### After treatment - Multiple testing correction: **FDR** - Statistical test: **Wilcoxon** ::: {#tbl-table-of-findings-after .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell layout-align="center"} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](alpha_shannon_files/figure-html/fig-figure-of-findings-within-1.png){#fig-figure-of-findings-within fig-align='center' width=480} ::: ::: #### Within-group ##### Paired treatment - Multiple testing correction: **FDR** - Statistical test: **paired Wilcoxon** ::: {#tbl-table-of-findings-paired .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ### LMM Research Question 1: Did the diet change the microbiota? - The interaction term (Treatment:Timepoint) tests whether the effect of time on Alpha diversity depends on the diet group. - Post-hoc analysis within each diet group identifies specific changes in Alpha diversity over time. Research Question 2: Was the microbiota equal between the diet groups before and after diet? - The main effect of diet tests for differences in Alpha diversity between diet groups at baseline. - Post-hoc analysis across diet groups at each timepoint identifies specific differences between diets Interpret the Results - Main Effects: - diet: Tests for differences in microbiota between Diet A and Diet B at Baseline. - duration: Tests for changes in microbiota over time across both diets. - diet:duration: Tests whether the effect of Timepoint depends on the diet group. - Random Effects: - (1|id): Accounts for within-subject variability. ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: - Multiple testing correction: **FDR** - Statistical test: **paired Wilcoxon** - Formula used: **~ diet * timepoint + (1 | id)** ::: {#tbl-table-of-interaction .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}

Week 6 |Rice | -0.0716062| 0.0428860| 67| -1.669686| 0.0996477| |Baseline - Week 6 |Oat | 0.0666762| 0.0435121| 67| 1.532359| 0.1301423| ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](alpha_shannon_files/figure-html/fig-figure-of-interaction-within-1.png){#fig-figure-of-interaction-within width=672} ::: ::: *Across-Group Comparisons* How to read the results; N.B This interpretation is an example of how to read. - For Marginal Means (emmeans): - Low diversity (e.g., Shannon = 2.5): "The mean Shannon diversity for diet oat was 2.5 (95% CI: 2.3, 2.7), indicating lower microbial diversity compared to typical healthy gut microbiomes (Shannon ~3-5)." - High diversity (e.g., Shannon = 4.2):"The mean Shannon diversity for diet rice was 4.2 (95% CI: 4.0, 4.4), indicating a rich and balanced microbial community." - For Contrasts: - Negative estimate (e.g., -0.8):"diet oat had significantly lower Shannon diversity than diet rice (estimate = -0.8, p < 0.05), suggesting reduced microbial richness." - Positive estimate (e.g., 0.8):"diet oat had significantly higher Shannon diversity than diet rice (estimate = 0.8, p < 0.05), suggesting enhanced microbial balance." ::: {#tbl-table-of-interaction-across-emmeans .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} Table: Estimated Marginal Means for Diets |diet |timepoint | coef| SE| df| lower.CL| upper.CL| |:----|:---------|--------:|---------:|--------:|--------:|--------:| |Rice |Baseline | 4.071365| 0.0679572| 81.63777| 3.936168| 4.206563| |Oat |Baseline | 4.036545| 0.0689493| 81.63777| 3.899374| 4.173716| |Rice |Week 6 | 4.142971| 0.0679572| 81.63777| 4.007774| 4.278169| |Oat |Week 6 | 3.969869| 0.0689493| 81.63777| 3.832697| 4.107040| ::: ::: ::: {#tbl-table-of-interaction-across-contrasts .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} Table: Estimated contrasts for Diets |contrast |duration | estimate| SE| df| t.ratio| p.value| |:----------|:--------|---------:|-------:|--------:|---------:|---------:| |Rice - Oat |Baseline | 0.0348203| 0.09681| 81.63777| 0.3596765| 0.7200178| |Rice - Oat |Week 6 | 0.1731026| 0.09681| 81.63777| 1.7880653| 0.0774758| ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](alpha_shannon_files/figure-html/fig-figure-of-interaction-across-1.png){#fig-figure-of-interaction-across width=672} ::: ::: ## Data Summary ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` class: TreeSummarizedExperiment dim: 1700 138 metadata(0): assays(1): relabundance rownames(1700): SGB4933 SGB4285 ...
